info.title: CMS Platform API
info.description: Content Management System — Laravel 12 + Sanctum. All admin endpoints require a Bearer token from POST /api/login.

post.summary: Login and receive a Sanctum token

get.summary: Get the authenticated user with role and privileges array
Public menu tree with published pages — no auth required
List menu items as tree (all statuses) — requires privilege menu.list

post.summary: Create a menu item — requires privilege menu.create
Bulk reorder menu items (drag-and-drop sync) — requires privilege menu.reorder
Update a menu item — requires privilege menu.edit

delete.summary: Delete menu item — Admin only. Cascades to child items and pages.

get.summary: List all pages (paginated) — requires privilege pages.list

post.summary: Create a page — requires privilege pages.create

get.summary: Get a single page — requires privilege pages.list

post.summary: Update a page — requires privilege pages.edit. Use POST for multipart.

delete.summary: Delete a page — Admin only (requires privilege pages.delete). Moderators get 403.

get.summary: Get a published page by slug — no auth required

404.description: Page not found or not published

get.summary: List all privileges — Admin only (requires privilege privileges.list)
Get a single privilege — Admin only
List all roles with privileges — Admin only (requires privilege roles.list)

post.summary: Create a role and assign privileges — Admin only
Update a role and sync privileges — Admin only
